## Read examples

Requester-pays prerequisite (once public IAM permits it):

```bash
export BILLING_PROJECT='<your-gcp-billing-project>'
gcloud storage cp --billing-project="$BILLING_PROJECT" 'gs://jouvencekb/kg/v2/features/embeddings/text/disease/sbiobert_snli_multinli_stsb/release_20260715_v1__src_b0cc26307c23/part-*.parquet' ./
```

PyArrow (GCS credentials/application-default credentials must carry the billing project):

```python
import os
import gcsfs
import pyarrow.dataset as ds
billing_project = os.environ['BILLING_PROJECT']
fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(project=billing_project, requester_pays=billing_project)
paths = fs.glob('jouvencekb/kg/v2/features/embeddings/text/disease/sbiobert_snli_multinli_stsb/release_20260715_v1__src_b0cc26307c23/part-*.parquet')
dataset = ds.dataset(paths, filesystem=fs, format='parquet')
print(dataset.head(5, columns=['embedding_key']))
```

DuckDB:

```sql
-- Run after the requester-pays `gcloud storage cp` command above.
SELECT embedding_key FROM read_parquet('./*.parquet') LIMIT 5;
```

## LaminDB / PyG linkage

This is a sidecar. Join through the declared node/edge/NCT keys; it is not topology unless a separate reviewed exporter explicitly consumes it.

## Caveats and leakage

Split by canonical node/edge task before fitting or evaluating; source text/clinical payloads may encode target evidence.

Publication blockers:
- The model revision is symbolic huggingface-main, not an immutable checkpoint commit.
- No model-license evidence is present in the authorized producer/reviewer packet.
- No explicit no-silent-truncation/max-token policy is evidenced for the text run.
- The public Arrow schema requires reviewed reconciliation from source list<double> to fixed_size_list<float32>.
